name: CLI-first knowledge store
summary: Wikiwiki stores repo knowledge as validated JSONL records and renders deterministic Markdown pages.
details: The MVP keeps the source of truth in .wikiwiki/records and treats wiki/ as generated output.

name: Spin heuristics
summary: The spin command turns git working tree changes into structured update suggestions without AI summarization.
details: The MVP reads git status and diff stats, groups changed files by simple path patterns, and returns JSON that an external agent can interpret.

name: Append-only record revisions
summary: Record updates append a new JSONL revision with the same logical id, while deletes append a tombstone that active reads, rendering, and search exclude.
details: Validation accepts repeated ids only as ordered revisions. Status, render, search, and record list/get use the latest non-deleted revision.

name: Daily agent loop
summary: Wikiwiki V1 supports a CLI-first loop for status, spin, structured capture, revision, validation, rendering, and local search.
details: The loop remains model-agnostic. Spin emits heuristic draft templates and command hints rather than AI-generated prose.
